title: Strolid Social Teasers (Dealer-Focused, No Future AI Marketplace)
summary: This document outlines various marketing hooks for Strolid, categorized into different aspects of their service, focusing on improving dealer operations, lead follow-up, conversation insights, and BDC performance. It provides specific messaging examples designed to resonate with dealers regarding common challenges and Strolid's solutions.
text:
🔥 
Strolid Social Teasers (Dealer-Focused, No Future AI Marketplace)
Built around what you already do: BDC performance, follow-up, reporting, insights, and conversation intelligence. 

Highlighted areas are messaging Vin likes

⭐ 
Category 1: “Follow-Up & Lost Leads”
1️⃣
“Most dealers think they have a lead problem.
What they really have is a follow-up problem.”
→ We see it every day.
2️⃣
“Thousands of customer conversations happen in your store every week. The question is: do you know what’s actually happening in them?”
→ Most don’t. We’re changing that.
3️⃣
“Every store has leads slipping between the cracks.
The best stores know where — the rest find out too late.”
→ If you’re curious which one you are, ask.

⭐ 
Category 2: “Conversation Insights Dealers Have Never Had”
4️⃣
“Dealers spend millions driving traffic, but almost nothing on understanding the conversations that come from it.”
→ Until now.
5️⃣
“Complaint spikes. Price shoppers. Trade-in hesitation.
You can see all of this the moment it happens — if you know where to look.”
6️⃣ 
“Imagine knowing the questions customers ask the most before your team even tells you.”
→ We’re giving dealers that view.

⭐ 
Category 3: “BDC Performance + Accountability Without Drama”
7️⃣
“Great BDCs aren’t built on pressure — they’re built on visibility.”
→ Show me the conversations and I’ll show you the truth.
8️⃣
“Your BDC might be busy…
But is it effective?”
→ There’s a big difference.
9️⃣
“Dealers don’t need more dashboards.
They need the right insights at the right time.”

⭐ 
Category 4: “Strolid GPT + Signals (Delivered Now)”
🔟
“Dealers don’t need another tool — they need a tool that reads the conversations they already have.”
1️⃣1️⃣
“When every customer question, complaint, objection, and opportunity is searchable in seconds… everything changes.”
1️⃣2️⃣
“We’re helping dealers see patterns their CRM could never show — because the CRM doesn’t read conversations.”

⭐ 
Category 5: “Operational Fixing — What Strolid Is Known For”
1️⃣3️⃣
“Most problems in the dealership happen long before the customer ever walks in. That’s where we live.”
1️⃣4️⃣
“Missed emails. Unworked leads. Bad notes. Slow replies.
The things nobody wants to talk about… we fix.”
1️⃣5️⃣
“If you’ve ever wondered why your CRM numbers don’t match what actually happened… you’re not alone.”

⭐ 
Category 6: “Warm Flow & Human Handoff (Delivering Soon)”
1️⃣6️⃣
“Customers don’t go cold — they’re made cold.”
→ Bad handoffs are the silent killer of car deals.
1️⃣7️⃣
“Your store should never lose a customer just because one person didn’t see a message.”
1️⃣8️⃣
“We’re building a better way to keep customers warm — automatically.”
→ Simple. Effective. And coming soon.

⭐ 
Category 7: “Service BDC + Expansion Areas”
1️⃣9️⃣
“Dealers are shocked when they see how many service customers never respond… and how easy it is to fix.”
2️⃣0️⃣
“The fastest way to increase service revenue?
Follow up on every declined recommendation and customers who defected.
You’d may be surprised how often that doesn’t happen. Or maybe not” 

⭐ 
Category 8: “The Strolid Promise Without Saying Too Much”
2️⃣1️⃣
“Our job is simple: make sure no customer gets ignored, and no opportunity dies quietly.”
2️⃣2️⃣
“If you knew what we know from 200,000+ conversations a month… you’d run your store differently.”
2️⃣3️⃣
“We’re building tools that help dealers listen better, act faster, and never lose track of a customer again.”
